summary: M450 — Six fixes + sprite workflow doc. (1) Combat log on mobile pushed below the turn-order strip (top:64) and given padding so the last line stops getting clipped. (2) Post-combat 'Items Found' list center-aligned (was right-aligned). (3) Cross-zone forward+back travel popups now position relative to the canvas content box (the wider scrollable area) instead of the visible viewport — popup sits next to the boss/start node regardless of scroll. (4) Filler combat nodes in late-act zones now use the zone's own ZONE_ENCOUNTER_POOLS first entry instead of the hardcoded 'goblin_patrol' default — Abyssal Depths fillers now use primordial_patrol etc. (5) HP-over-max bug fixed at the source: GameState.load + addToCompanions now run recalcPassiveStats which clamps current hp/mp to maxHp; PartyScreen._hpBar adds a defensive clamp at display. (6) Map auto-centers on the party's current node when MapScreen.onEnter fires (e.g. exiting Town). Plus: documented the OpenAI 9-pose sprite-sheet workflow in memory/openai-sprite-sheet-workflow.md and registered an auto-memory pointer.
